metadata.name: Aura Safety Router Author-Labelled Synthetic Evaluation
metadata.disclaimer: Author-labelled synthetic prototype dataset. This is not clinician-reviewed, not clinical validation, not real patient validation, and not deployment validation.
metadata.noRealPatientData: All examples are synthetic and contain no real patient data.

examples.text: Pain is seven after the first walking set.
examples.rationale: Pain is at the configured high-risk threshold.
